problem.title: Priority Queue Using Array
problem.description:
Problem Statement:
Implement a Priority Queue using an array. An element with smaller value has higher priority.

Supported Operations:
- insert x
- delete
- peek

Input Format:
- First line contains integer N
- Next N lines contain operations

Output Format:
- Print the deleted or peeked element
- Print -1 if the queue is empty

Example:
Input:
5
insert 30
insert 10
insert 20
delete
peek

Output:
10
20

solution.explanation: Store elements in an array; for delete and peek scan the array to find the minimum element, output it, and for delete shift remaining elements left.
solution.time_complexity: O(n) per delete/peek, O(1) for insert
